name: ExtensionDeviceAssociation_Period
title: R5: Begin and end dates and times for the device association (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `DeviceAssociation.period` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`DeviceAssociation.period` 0..1 `Period`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `DeviceAssociation.period` 0..1 `Period`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `DeviceAssociation.period` has a context of Device based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Device`.
Element `DeviceAssociation.period` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
